source_policy: Derived one-way from READ-ONLY C:\SW_MUSH. SW_MUSH remains read-only. WEG Star Wars D6 R&E; Clone Wars era (20 BBY). Source: data/vendor_droids.yaml (era-neutral commerce droids for the player-vendor economy).

gn4.name: GN-4 Vendor Droid
gn4.description: A basic vendor droid with simple text-listing capability.

gn7.name: GN-7 Merchant Droid
gn7.description: A mid-tier droid with a Bargain processor. Negotiates small discounts for buyers.

gn12.name: GN-12 Commerce Droid
gn12.description: Top-tier commerce droid. Posts buy orders, offers the best terms.
